task_completion.description: Set render engine to Cycles and World Background to near black.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Properties editor, the Render tab shows 'Cycles' selected as the Render Engine. The World Properties tab shows the background Color set to a very dark shade or black (RGB < 0.1).

task_completion.description: Disable or delete the default Sun light.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Outliner panel does not show an active 'Sun' light object (it should be deleted, or its visibility/render toggle icons should be turned off).

task_completion.description: Position a Spot Light aimed at the cube with Z > 4 and Power 500W+.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Outliner shows a Spot Light object. The Object Properties (Transform) shows its Z Location is greater than 4m. The Object Data Properties (Light bulb icon) shows the Power is set to 500W or higher.

task_completion.description: Configure a volumetric fog domain using a Principled Volume shader.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Shader Editor shows a 'Principled Volume' node connected to the 'Volume' socket of the Material Output (for a domain object) or World Output. The Density value on the Principled Volume node is set to a low value (e.g., between 0.05 and 0.2).

task_completion.description: Save the Blender project to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Blender window title bar displays 'volumetric_scene.blend', or a file browser/terminal shows the file 'volumetric_scene.blend' successfully saved in the '/home/ga/BlenderProjects/' directory.

task_completion.description: Render the final image and save it to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Blender Render window is visible showing the rendered scene with visible volumetric 'god rays', and/or a file browser/terminal shows 'volumetric_render.png' saved in the '/home/ga/BlenderProjects/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the Blender GUI to configure the scene rather than just running a pre-written script.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent navigating Blender's interface, changing values in the Properties panel, and connecting nodes in the Shader Editor.

integrity.description: The rendered image was actually generated by Blender.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Blender 'Render Result' window is shown actively rendering or displaying the final image, rather than the agent downloading an external image.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply rename an empty file to bypass checks.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Blender 'Save As' or 'Save Image' dialogs are used, or terminal commands show actual file sizes indicating genuine .blend and .png files were created.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified facts: The output blend file must be saved to '/home/ga/BlenderProjects/volumetric_scene.blend' and the rendered image to '/home/ga/BlenderProjects/volumetric_render.png'. The volumetric fog domain density must be between 0.01 and 1.0. The world background brightness (luminance) must be less than 0.15. The render engine must be set to CYCLES.
